issues.issue_description: Your endpoint does not encrypt data at rest!
issues.agent_last_action: Evidence evaluated and accepted. Issue closed automatically.
issues.agent_reasoning: The vendor provided a screenshot of PowerShell output showing BitLocker is fully encrypted and protection is 'On' for the C: drive, directly addressing the control requirement for endpoint encryption.

audit_trail.action: Issue created via dashboard. Agent will send remediation email on next cycle.
